case_title: B. D. THAKOR VS. ERNICE FAGAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR THAKOR, B. D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 TAYLOR ST. #401 S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D. AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D. AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE DOES 1-10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D. SERVED AUG-29-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.44 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FAGAN, ERNICE
